docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY BROOKS, KELVIN HICKS, YVETTE AS TO DEFENDANT KALBEK, GARY C/O FAMILY AFFAIR TRUCKS & CARS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-10-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
